title: Knock On Doors
description: You can knock on your friend's door.
body:
**Knock On Doors** is simple gameplay focused plugin for Spigot and Paper Servers. It allows you or your players to knock on doors to see if someones there. The knocking changes for every door type. Making it a good fit for a modified survival server or roleplay servers that want small but big details.

Features:
- Every door type support. So it supports oak and other varients.
- Lightweight and efficient. No performance impact.
- Plug and play. No configuration or setup needed.
